description:
As a user
  I want to navigate to the Add/Remove Elements page from the homepage
  So that I can dynamically add and remove elements and verify the counts

elements.name: Navigate to Add/Remove Elements page from homepage

steps.name: I open the The Internet homepage
I navigate to "Add/Remove Elements" link
I should be on path "/add_remove_elements/"

elements.name: Add multiple elements and verify count

steps.name: I open the The Internet homepage
I navigate to "Add/Remove Elements" link
I should be on path "/add_remove_elements/"
I add 3 elements
I should see 3 delete buttons

elements.name: Remove all added elements and verify empty state

steps.name: I open the The Internet homepage
I navigate to "Add/Remove Elements" link
I should be on path "/add_remove_elements/"
I add 3 elements
I should see 3 delete buttons
I remove all elements
I should see 0 delete buttons

elements.name: Add a single element and remove it

steps.name: I open the The Internet homepage
I navigate to "Add/Remove Elements" link
I should be on path "/add_remove_elements/"
I add 1 elements
I should see 1 delete buttons
I remove all elements
I should see 0 delete buttons

name: Add/Remove Elements

description:
As a user
  I want to navigate to advanced links and execute key operations
  So that critical behavior is validated end-to-end

elements.name: Basic Auth link should allow successful authentication

steps.name: I open The Internet homepage for advanced links suite
I navigate to advanced link "Basic Auth"
I authenticate advanced Basic Auth with configured credentials
I should land on advanced path "/basic_auth"
I should see advanced Basic Auth success content

elements.name: Broken Images page should show broken assets in UI and API

steps.name: I open The Internet homepage for advanced links suite
I navigate to advanced link "Broken Images"
I should land on advanced path "/broken_images"
I should validate broken images through UI and API

elements.name: Challenging DOM page should support table actions

steps.name: I open The Internet homepage for advanced links suite
I navigate to advanced link "Challenging DOM"
I should land on advanced path "/challenging_dom"
I perform advanced Challenging DOM operations

elements.name: Checkboxes page should support toggle operations

steps.name: I open The Internet homepage for advanced links suite
I navigate to advanced link "Checkboxes"
I should land on advanced path "/checkboxes"
I perform advanced checkbox operations

elements.name: Context Menu page should show context alert

steps.name: I open The Internet homepage for advanced links suite
I navigate to advanced link "Context Menu"
I should land on advanced path "/context_menu"
I perform advanced context menu operation

name: Advanced link navigation and operations

description:
As a user
  I want to navigate through digest and dynamic links
  So that key behaviors are validated with UI and API checks

elements.name: Digest Authentication should validate credentials through API

steps.name: I open homepage for auth dynamic suite
I navigate to auth dynamic link "Digest Authentication"
I should be on auth dynamic path "/digest_auth"
I verify digest authentication through API

elements.name: Disappearing Elements should allow menu navigation operation

steps.name: I open homepage for auth dynamic suite
I navigate to auth dynamic link "Disappearing Elements"
I should be on auth dynamic path "/disappearing_elements"
I perform disappearing elements operation

elements.name: Drag and Drop should swap columns

steps.name: I open homepage for auth dynamic suite
I navigate to auth dynamic link "Drag and Drop"
I should be on auth dynamic path "/drag_and_drop"
I perform drag and drop operation

elements.name: Dropdown should allow selecting multiple options

steps.name: I open homepage for auth dynamic suite
I navigate to auth dynamic link "Dropdown"
I should be on auth dynamic path "/dropdown"
I perform dropdown selection operation

elements.name: Dynamic Content should change after refresh

steps.name: I open homepage for auth dynamic suite
I navigate to auth dynamic link "Dynamic Content"
I should be on auth dynamic path "/dynamic_content"
I perform dynamic content refresh operation

elements.name: Dynamic Controls should support checkbox and input operations

steps.name: I open homepage for auth dynamic suite
I navigate to auth dynamic link "Dynamic Controls"
I should be on auth dynamic path "/dynamic_controls"
I perform dynamic controls operation

elements.name: Dynamic Loading should show Hello World in both examples

steps.name: I open homepage for auth dynamic suite
I navigate to auth dynamic link "Dynamic Loading"
I should be on auth dynamic path "/dynamic_loading"
I perform dynamic loading operations

name: Digest and dynamic links navigation and operations

description:
As a user
  I want to navigate through browser-driven UI pages
  So that hover, slider, scroll, dialog, and geolocation behaviors are validated

elements.name: Geolocation should display configured coordinates

steps.name: I open homepage for browser UI links suite
I navigate to browser UI link "Geolocation"
I should be on browser UI path "/geolocation"
I perform geolocation operation

elements.name: Horizontal Slider should move to the target value

steps.name: I open homepage for browser UI links suite
I navigate to browser UI link "Horizontal Slider"
I should be on browser UI path "/horizontal_slider"
I perform horizontal slider operation

elements.name: Hovers should reveal the first user profile

steps.name: I open homepage for browser UI links suite
I navigate to browser UI link "Hovers"
I should be on browser UI path "/hovers"
I perform hovers operation

elements.name: Infinite Scroll should load more content

steps.name: I open homepage for browser UI links suite
I navigate to browser UI link "Infinite Scroll"
I should be on browser UI path "/infinite_scroll"
I perform infinite scroll operation

elements.name: Inputs should accept and increment a numeric value

steps.name: I open homepage for browser UI links suite
I navigate to browser UI link "Inputs"
I should be on browser UI path "/inputs"
I perform inputs operation

elements.name: JQuery UI Menus should open the Downloads submenu

steps.name: I open homepage for browser UI links suite
I navigate to browser UI link "JQuery UI Menus"
I should be on browser UI path "/jqueryui/menu"
I perform jquery ui menus operation

elements.name: JavaScript Alerts should handle alert confirm and prompt dialogs

steps.name: I open homepage for browser UI links suite
I navigate to browser UI link "JavaScript Alerts"
I should be on browser UI path "/javascript_alerts"
I perform javascript alerts operations

elements.name: JavaScript onload event error should expose page error behavior

steps.name: I open homepage for browser UI links suite
I navigate to browser UI link "JavaScript onload event error"
I should be on browser UI path "/javascript_error"
I perform javascript error operation

name: Browser UI links navigation and operations

elements.name: Navigate to Key Presses and detect a pressed key

steps.name: I am on the Heroku home page
I click the "Key Presses" link
I should be on the "/key_presses" page
the Key Presses input is visible
I press the "Tab" key in the input
the result should show "You entered: TAB"

elements.name: Navigate to Large & Deep DOM and verify deep cell

steps.name: I am on the Heroku home page
I click the "Large & Deep DOM" link
I should be on the "/large" page
the large DOM page is loaded
the deep cell "sibling-50.3" exists in the DOM

elements.name: Navigate to Multiple Windows and open a new tab

steps.name: I am on the Heroku home page
I click the "Multiple Windows" link
I should be on the "/windows" page
the Multiple Windows page is loaded
I open the new window
the new window should be at path "/windows/new"
the new window should have heading "New Window"

elements.name: Navigate to Nested Frames and verify frame content

steps.name: I am on the Heroku home page
I click the "Nested Frames" link
I should be on the "/nested_frames" page
the nested frames should contain texts "LEFT", "MIDDLE", "RIGHT" and "BOTTOM"

elements.name: Navigate to Notification Messages and trigger a flash message

steps.name: I am on the Heroku home page
I click the "Notification Messages" link
I should be on the "/notification_message_rendered" page
the Notification Messages page is loaded
I trigger a notification
a valid notification flash message should be displayed

elements.name: Navigate to Redirect Link and be redirected to status codes

steps.name: I am on the Heroku home page
I click the "Redirect Link" link
I should be on the "/redirector" page
the Redirector page is loaded
I click the redirect link
I should be redirected to "/status_codes"
